name: Kim Chee#3
recipeInstructions: PREPARATION: Cut the large leaves of Chinese celery cabbage in half lengthwise; then cut all the leaves into 1/2-inch by 2-inch slices. Cut the radish into equal pieces and then into 1/2-inch slices. Place cabbage and radishes in a large pot and drain the oil from the anchovies over them. Peel, mince, and smash the garlic. Cut the scallions into thin strips lengthwise and then into 2-inch lengths. Add anchovies, minced garlic, scallions, salt, hot pepper flakes, and cayenne pepper to the cabbage and radish mixture, and mix thoroughly. Cover the pot tightly and allow to stand for 2 days at room temperature. This Kim Chi will keep in a tightly covered jar in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.
